title: File Community Subsistence Hunt 2020 (CM300) Moose Permits to Alaska Department of Fish and Game
summary: Deadline to report 2020 CM300 Moose Permits is October 5, 2020 Fill out 2020 CM300 Moose Permits and mail it to: Alaska Department of Fish & Game P.O. Box 47 Glennallen, Alaska 99588 Or do an online CM300 moose report at ADFG webpage: Go to: http://hunt.alaska.gov Click on File My Hunt Report . Fill...
